title: Bikas Chakrabarti
body: Bikas Kanta Chakrabarti (born 14 December 1952 in Kolkata (erstwhile Calcutta) is an Indian physicist.  At present he is Visiting Professor of Economics at the Indian Statistical Institute,  Kolkata, India.
categories: All Wikipedia articles written in Indian English
Articles lacking reliable references from April 2017
BLP articles lacking sources from April 2017
Recipients of the Shanti Swarup Bhatnagar Award in Physical Science
